strategy_snapshot.topology: Vertical AI Integration (TPU v8) -> Search Resilience -> Cloud Hyper-growth
strategy_snapshot.primary_vector: Internal Silicon Moat (30% Inference Cost Reduction) + Gemini 1.5/2.0 Ecosystem
strategy_snapshot.fragile_point: Capex Overload ($190B) impacting FCF vs DOJ Anti-trust remedies
strategy_snapshot.core_thesis: Alphabet has successfully de-risked the 'AI disruption to search' narrative, proving monetization parity in AI Mode while dominating enterprise AI infrastructure.

stop_loss_rules.macro_kill_switch: Search revenue growth falls below 12% or Cloud growth falls below 40%
